arg.name: runtime_config_package
arg.description: Package with the controller's configuration in 'config' folder. Usually the argument is not set, it enables use of a custom setup.

arg.name: controllers_file
arg.description: YAML file (without extension) with the controllers configuration.

arg.name: description_package
arg.description: Description package with robot URDF/xacro files. Usually the argument is not set, it enables use of a custom description.

arg.name: description_file
arg.description: URDF/XACRO description file (without extension) with the robot.

arg.name: prefix
arg.description: Prefix of the joint names, useful for multi-robot setup. If changed then joint names in the controllers configuration have to be updated.

arg.name: use_mock_hardware
arg.description: Start robot with mock hardware mirroring command to its states.

arg.name: mock_sensor_commands
arg.description: Enable mock command interfaces for sensors used for simple simulations. Used only if use_mock_hardware is true.

arg.name: robot_controller
arg.description: Robot controller to start. Choices are: [diff_drive_controller].

arg.name: use_ouster
arg.description: Start the Ouster OS0-128 driver as part of bringup.

arg.name: use_realsense
arg.description: Start the Intel RealSense D455 driver as part of bringup.

arg.name: use_gps
arg.description: Start the u-blox ZED-F9P GPS driver as part of bringup.

arg.name: use_memsense
arg.description: Start the Memsense MS-IMU3025 driver as part of bringup.

arg.name: ouster_namespace
arg.description: Namespace used by the Ouster ROS 2 driver.

arg.name: ouster_sensor_hostname
arg.description: Sensor hostname or IP for the Ouster OS0-128. Required when use_ouster is true.

arg.name: ouster_udp_dest
arg.description: Destination IP for Ouster UDP packets. Leave empty to use the driver's default behavior.

arg.name: ouster_lidar_mode
arg.description: Initial lidar mode for the Ouster OS0-128.

arg.name: realsense_namespace
arg.description: Namespace used by the RealSense ROS 2 driver.

arg.name: realsense_camera_name
arg.description: Node name used by the RealSense ROS 2 driver.

arg.name: realsense_serial_no
arg.description: Optional RealSense serial number used to select the D455 device.

arg.name: gps_node_name
arg.description: Node name used by the u-blox GPS driver.

arg.name: gps_device
arg.description: Serial device used by the u-blox ZED-F9P receiver.

arg.name: gps_frame_id
arg.description: Frame id published by the GPS driver.

arg.name: gps_config_file
arg.description: YAML configuration file for the u-blox GPS driver.

arg.name: memsense_node_name
arg.description: Node name used by the Memsense MS-IMU3025 driver.

arg.name: memsense_device
arg.description: Serial device used by the Memsense MS-IMU3025 receiver.

arg.name: memsense_frame_id
arg.description: Frame id published by the Memsense MS-IMU3025 driver.

let.name: robot_description_content
let.value: $(command '$(find-exec xacro) $(find-pkg-share $(var description_package))/urdf/$(var description_file).urdf.xacro prefix:=$(var prefix) use_mock_hardware:=$(var use_mock_hardware) mock_sensor_commands:=$(var mock_sensor_commands) attach_world:=false')
